articles.title: Rain Brings Respite from Heatwave in New Delhi #Gallery - Social News XYZ
articles.full_text:
New Delhi: Dark clouds loom over the Parliament building as rain brings respite from the heatwave in New Delhi on Tuesday, June 16, 2026. (Photo: IANS/Qamar Sibtain)
